case_title: SEAN DE VRIES VS. MA MESINA et al

DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE VRIES, SEAN HEARING SET FOR DEC-18-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-18-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND ORDERED PLAINTIFF SEAN DE VRIES' DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR. A DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION WAS FILED ON DECEMBER 17, 2012. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-06-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR - DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ordered PLAINTIFF SEAN DE VRIES' DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT off calendar. A dismissal of entire action was filed on December 17, 2012. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077.
